description: Supply-chain hardening: every dependency update PR is held for at least 7 days after the release is published, so the community has time to catch malicious or broken versions before we pull them in.

packageRules.description: Hold lockfile changes 7 days minimum, including transitive deps.
Group all dev-dependency updates into one PR to reduce review fatigue.

vulnerabilityAlerts.description: Security advisories bypass the stability window only when they are themselves >= 7 days old.
